title: The Automation
description: A Loom and Horizon process note marking automation as both test and real report, where a possible folly or dream begins to move on its own in small degree.

motifMap.meaning: The artifact names itself as both experiment and account, folding process into record.
The automation is held between comic uncertainty and genuine aspiration.
The change is modest but real: things begin happening on their own.

excerpt: This is both the test and the real report. The process is becoming automated.

editHistory.notes: Manual live Substack check performed with user permission through the in-app browser because shell DNS/live extractor access was unavailable. Classified as The Loom and the Horizon / Methodic Self-Watching from the actual post text.
